title: MOMENTUM Study
titleKo: 유방암 대사 취약성 × 내분비치료 AI 분석
description: Exploring the intersection of metabolic vulnerability and endocrine therapy in breast cancer through AI techniques and real-world data from multi-institutions in Korea.

title: AI-Based Cancer Trajectory Recontextualization
description: Methodology for person-centered phenotyping applied to breast and colorectal cancer real-world data. Focuses on DL-based trajectory modeling and data-information value chain construction.

title: LLM-based Clinical NER
description: Integrated named entity recognition model for clinical text using large language models. Research includes journal publication and patent application.

title: LLM Performance Evaluation in Healthcare
titleKo: 의료 LLM 성능 평가 연구 (논문 + 특허)
description: Evaluation of large language model performance in healthcare contexts. Includes journal publication and patent application.

title: FAERS Dynamic Deduplication
description: Research on methodology for dynamic deduplication of FDA Adverse Event Reporting System (FAERS) data to improve pharmacovigilance signal detection accuracy.

title: SJS-TEN Pharmacovigilance
description: Adverse drug reaction research on Stevens-Johnson Syndrome (SJS) and Toxic Epidermal Necrolysis (TEN) using FDA FAERS and Korean HIRA claims data.
affiliation: Chonnam National University · College of Nursing

title: Social Determinants & Breast Cancer Mortality
titleKo: 거주 지역별 임상·공공데이터 통합 사망률 연구
description: Breast cancer mortality research integrating clinical and public data by residential area. Uses GIS and geographically weighted regression (GWR) methods.
affiliation: Samsung Seoul · Hematology-Oncology · U. Cincinnati · Harvard · Tufts · SKKU

title: Early-Life Antibiotics & Neurodevelopmental Disorders
description: Effect of excessive antibiotic prescription within the first 2 years of life on neurodevelopmental disorders including ADHD and autism spectrum disorder.
affiliation: Catholic University · Dept. of Biomedical Sciences

title: Ovulation Induction Agents Pharmacovigilance
description: Pharmacovigilance research on adverse drug reactions to ovulation induction agents based on FDA FAERS database analysis.
affiliation: Sookmyung Women's University · College of Pharmacy

title: Breast Cancer Clinical Subtype Classification
description: Multi-institution breast cancer clinical subtype classification algorithm research using real-world data.

title: AIs Endocrine Therapy Real-World Analysis
titleKo: 아로마타제 억제제 실사용 데이터 내분비치료 분석
description: Endocrine therapy analysis based on real-world aromatase inhibitor data, examining adverse drug reaction profiles by patient characteristics.

title: Breast Cancer Registry
description: Ongoing breast cancer registry construction and utilization research, supporting longitudinal cohort studies and clinical research.

title: Rectal Prolapse — HIRA Descriptive Study
description: Descriptive statistics study of rectal prolapse based on Health Insurance Review and Assessment (HIRA) claims data.
affiliation: Eunpyeong St. Mary's · Colorectal & Vascular Surgery

title: Colorectal Cancer Appropriateness Evaluation
description: Colorectal cancer appropriateness evaluation analysis based on HIRA claims data.
affiliation: Eunpyeong St. Mary's · Colorectal & Vascular Surgery

title: Incisional Hernia Surgical Trends in Korea
description: Analysis of incisional hernia surgical trend changes and identification of risk factors using Korean claims data.

title: PCOS Impact on MASLD Long-Term Prognosis
description: Long-term effect of polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS) in patients with metabolic dysfunction-associated steatotic liver disease (MASLD).

title: Napro Cohort DB → Predictive Modeling
titleKo: 나프로 코호트 DB 예측 모델링 (SDG 연계)
description: SDG-linked predictive modeling on the Napro cohort database. Research support submission and data curation in progress.

title: Data Quality Management Review
description: Review paper on data quality management methodologies for real-world clinical data.

title: Gaming Behaviors & Childhood Depression
description: Youth Cohort-based mixed-effects and machine learning research on the relationship between gaming behaviors and childhood depression.
